overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person driving perspective in heavy rain. The bus picks up a passenger at a glass shelter, then navigates through wet urban streets with moderate traffic, stopping at red lights and proceeding on green. The environment features tree-lined roads, intersections, and modern urban infrastructure with realistic rain effects and windshield wipers in constant motion.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop with glass shelter and boarding area

events.description: passenger boards the bus through the front door
bus pulls away from the stop and accelerates onto the wet road

agents.ego_description: waiting at bus stop with doors open for passenger boarding, then closing doors and departing

notable_agents.action: passenger entering the bus through the front door carrying a bag

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus stop shelter with transparent walls and roof
metal bench inside the shelter for waiting passengers
rain-soaked asphalt road with visible lane markings through the windshield

segments.scene_description: The bus is stationary at a modern glass bus shelter in heavy rain. A passenger boards through the front door, and then the bus pulls away from the curb onto the wet street. The windshield wipers are active, and the interior dashboard displays are illuminated.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet multi-lane urban arterial road with tree lines

events.description: approaching queue of stopped vehicles at traffic light ahead
slowing down and coming to a stop behind red car at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: driving along the wet multi-lane road, navigating through light rain with wipers active, then slowing to stop at traffic signal

notable_agents.action: red sedan stopped at the traffic light ahead of the bus
large freight truck waiting in the adjacent right lane

entered.detail: tall cable-stayed bridge tower visible through the rain haze in the distance
vertical traffic signal pole showing red light
line of mature green trees along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a wet multi-lane road lined with trees on both sides. A distinctive bridge tower is visible in the distance through the rain. The bus approaches a queue of stopped vehicles at a traffic light, slowing down behind a red sedan with a large truck in the lane to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green signaling proceed
accelerating through the intersection following the vehicle ahead

agents.ego_description: waiting at the red light behind other vehicles, then accelerating smoothly through the intersection as the light turns green

notable_agents.action: red sedan accelerating through the intersection ahead of the bus
large truck beginning to move forward in the right lane

entered.detail: white zebra crossing stripes painted on the road surface
blue directional road signs mounted at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a red light at a wide intersection, the bus waits behind a red sedan. The traffic light changes to green, and the bus accelerates through the intersection, crossing the white zebra-striped crosswalk. The bridge structure moves to the left side of the frame as the bus proceeds straight ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined boulevard with grass median and cycle path

events.description: making a right turn at the intersection onto a new road

agents.ego_description: driving along a tree-lined boulevard with active windshield wipers, then signaling and executing a right turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking on the sidewalk in the distance wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: strip of green grass separating the road lanes with small bushes
large blue highway direction sign with white text indicating routes
thick canopy of mature trees forming a green tunnel effect over the road

segments.scene_description: Driving along a scenic boulevard with dense trees forming a canopy overhead and a grass median to the left. The bus passes a blue highway sign and then makes a right turn at an intersection, leaving the crosswalk behind. The trees become more prominent on the left side as the bus progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with parking lots and retail buildings

events.description: approaching stopped traffic queue at the next traffic light
coming to a complete stop behind black sedan at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: driving on the wet commercial street then slowing to a stop behind a line of traffic at the next signal

notable_agents.action: black sedan with illuminated brake lights stopped at the traffic light
white car merging into the lane from a parking lot on the right

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with red signage and front parking lot
traffic signal showing red light at the next intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus drives past a commercial area with retail buildings and parking lots on the right. As the bus approaches the next intersection, it slows down and comes to a stop behind a black sedan waiting at a red traffic light. A white car merges into the traffic flow from a parking lot on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a stationary bus stop through a rain-slicked urban journey that transitions from a residential boulevard to a commercial district. It begins at a modern glass shelter where a passenger boards before the bus pulls away into heavy rain, with active windshield wipers clearing the view of a tree-lined road. As the bus advances toward a distant bridge tower, it slows to a halt behind a red sedan and a large truck at a wide intersection. The scene then shifts as the light turns green, prompting the bus to accelerate across a zebra-striped crosswalk and glide under a dense canopy of trees along a scenic boulevard. Finally, the camera follows a right turn that leads away from the greenery and into a commercial area, where the bus slows once more to stop behind a black sedan as a white car merges from a nearby parking lot.
